ground_truth.title: Personal Training
ground_truth.main_content:
Maximize your workouts with the help of a certified personal trainer who will design a custom plan to help you achieve your fitness goals. Personal training sessions are available for UT students and RecSports members.

For groups, visit the Bring Fitness to Your Group page for programming options.

General Information

All personal trainers maintain a nationally recognized personal training certification.
Sessions can take place at any of the seven RecSports facilities.
Currently enrolled UT students and RecSports members are eligible to purchase personal training sessions.

Training Packages

You may choose to purchase a package to train one-on-one or with a buddy. 
All sessions are 60 minutes in length.
All packages include a complimentary initial 30-minute consultation.
Sessions expire 365 days from the date of purchase.
You may only purchase the Get Started with Personal Training package once.

One-on-One Training

Package	Fee
Get Started with Personal Training
Designed for participants who are new to personal training. Includes a fitness assessment, space orientation, and 2 personal training sessions	Student: $80
RecSports Member: $130
2 personal training sessions	Student: $80
RecSports Member: $130
5 personal training sessions	Student: $190
RecSports Member: $240
10 personal training sessions	Student: $345
RecSports Member: $450
20 personal training sessions	Student: $630
RecSports Member: $800

Buddy Training

Prices listed below are per participant.

Package	Fee
Get Started with Personal Training
Designed for participants who are new to personal training. Includes a fitness assessment, space orientation, and 2 personal training sessions	Student: $55
RecSports Member: $110
2 personal training sessions	Student: $55
RecSports Member: $110
5 personal training sessions	Student: $145
RecSports Member: $185
10 personal training sessions	Student: $265
RecSports Member: $330
20 personal training sessions	Student: $450
RecSports Member: $565

How to Register

Purchase your desired package/number of sessions on RecSports Online Store.
Complete the required Participant Information Packet (UT EID login required).
Your personal trainer will contact you to schedule your first appointment. Please allow up to 14 days to be assigned a trainer.

Register
